title: Nothing Happened on Thriller Bark: Turning Point
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of nothing happened on thriller bark: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Run!!! Get back to the forest!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're really done for this time!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The morning sun is leaking through!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Stay in the shadows of the buildings!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I... am responsible... for this gamble.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They've had their shadows taken, too...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If they haven't given up on victory,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Then I won't move from this spot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Take good care of yourselves now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: placing your hope on someone's shoulders !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm gonna get a little wild!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: All right, take care of it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WE'LL LEAVE THE REST TO YOU!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of nothing happened on thriller bark: turning point.
